executionLogEventsPrepared.jm1_actiondescription: IMPRINT_PUBLISHER_APPROVED: Full Publisher Master Imprint Register certified PROGRAM-002/PAM imprint 'J Merrill Publishing' for 'God’s Nudge' by Tekisha Wimbush. Historical published imprint preserved.
IMPRINT_LOCKED: Full Publisher Master Imprint Register certified PROGRAM-002/PAM imprint 'J Merrill Publishing' for 'God’s Nudge' by Tekisha Wimbush. Historical published imprint preserved.

IMPRINT_PUBLISHER_APPROVED: Full Publisher Master Imprint Register certified PROGRAM-002/PAM imprint 'J Merrill Publishing' for 'God’s Word For This World' by Thomas Johnson, Sr.. Historical published imprint preserved.

IMPRINT_LOCKED: Full Publisher Master Imprint Register certified PROGRAM-002/PAM imprint 'J Merrill Publishing' for 'God’s Word For This World' by Thomas Johnson, Sr.. Historical published imprint preserved.

IMPRINT_PUBLISHER_APPROVED: Full Publisher Master Imprint Register certified PROGRAM-002/PAM imprint 'J Merrill Publishing' for 'The Master’s Piece' by Sylvia Benson. Historical published imprint preserved.
IMPRINT_LOCKED: Full Publisher Master Imprint Register certified PROGRAM-002/PAM imprint 'J Merrill Publishing' for 'The Master’s Piece' by Sylvia Benson. Historical published imprint preserved.
IMPRINT_PUBLISHER_APPROVED: Full Publisher Master Imprint Register certified PROGRAM-002/PAM imprint 'JM Works' for 'Warrior’s Breed' by Dean Wilson. Historical published imprint preserved.
IMPRINT_LOCKED: Full Publisher Master Imprint Register certified PROGRAM-002/PAM imprint 'JM Works' for 'Warrior’s Breed' by Dean Wilson. Historical published imprint preserved.
